help_subtitle: How to Use the Calculator Suite
standard_calculator_help_1: Enter numbers and operations using the buttons.
standard_calculator_help_3: Your calculation history will be displayed below the calculator.
scientific_calculator_help_1: Supports advanced functions like exponents, square roots, factorials, and complex numbers.
scientific_calculator_help_2: Use parentheses to control the order of operations.
scientific_calculator_help_3: The "Ans" button allows you to use the result of your last calculation in a new expression.
equations_help_1: Solve linear equations with one or two unknowns.
equations_help_2: Enter coefficients and constants to define your equation.
equations_help_3: The user must use x and y as input variables and use the following pattern: ax (+by) + c = d.
equations_help_4: Works with decimal numbers but not fractions.
unit_converter_help_1: Convert between different units of measurement.
unit_converter_help_2: Enter a value and select the units you want to convert from.
currency_converter_help_1: Convert between different currencies using daily updated exchange rates.
currency_converter_help_2: Enter an amount and select the currencies you want to convert between.
programmer_help_1: Perform calculations in different number systems (binary, octal, decimal, hexadecimal).
programmer_help_2: Use the base conversion feature to switch between number systems.
